label: 填充家具放置器
description: 将填充家具反复放置到室内空间网格中，每类家具持续放置直到房间占用率达到上限（贴边65%、居中80%）或连续5次找不到合法位置为止。
description-en: Repeatedly places fill furniture into a room grid until occupancy limits are reached (65% for edge, 80% for center) or placement fails 5 consecutive times.
icon: 扁平插画风格图标。俯视房间平面图，房间内已有少量大家具，多个相同的小方块家具从四面墙边密集填入，用绿色虚线箭头表示反复填充的动作，主色调绿色和浅灰，背景白色，线条简洁。

inputs.name: roomGrid
inputs.label: 室内空间网格
inputs.description: 房间可用区域网格，1=可放置格，0=墙或外部
inputs.description-en: Room interior grid: 1 = walkable cell, 0 = wall or outside.

inputs.name: maskA
inputs.label: 家具实体网格 (maskA)
inputs.description: 已有家具实体占用网格，通常来自单一家具放置器的输出；无旧家具时传全零网格
inputs.description-en: Furniture body occupancy grid from a prior placement step; pass all-zero grid if none.

inputs.name: maskB
inputs.label: 过道预留网格 (maskB)
inputs.description: 已有过道预留网格，通常来自单一家具放置器的输出；无旧家具时传全零网格
inputs.description-en: Aisle reservation grid from a prior placement step; pass all-zero grid if none.

inputs.name: oldFurnitureIndex
inputs.label: 旧家具编号列表
inputs.description: 已放置家具的编号列表，每项含 rank/name/isGroup；无旧家具时传 []
inputs.description-en: Index of already-placed furniture items (rank/name/isGroup); pass empty array if none.

inputs.name: furnitureList
inputs.label: 填充家具清单
inputs.description: 待填充的家具列表（来自 furniture_rank_split 的 fill_list），每项含 rank/name/furniture_id/type/placement
inputs.description-en: Fill furniture list (from furniture_rank_split fill_list output), each item with rank/name/furniture_id/type/placement.

inputs.name: seed
inputs.label: 随机种子
inputs.description: 控制填充位置随机性的种子值，相同种子产生相同布局，默认 42
inputs.description-en: Random seed for filling; same seed produces the same layout. Default: 42.

outputs.name: newMaskA
outputs.label: 新家具实体网格
outputs.description: 填充完毕后的家具实体占用网格，非零值为 effectiveRank（旧最大 rank + 填充 rank）
outputs.description-en: Updated furniture body mask after filling; non-zero values are effective rank numbers.

outputs.name: newMaskB
outputs.label: 新过道预留网格
outputs.description: 填充完毕后的过道预留网格，1=已预留过道
outputs.description-en: Updated aisle reservation mask after filling; 1 = reserved aisle cell.

outputs.name: furnitureIndex
outputs.label: 家具编号列表
outputs.description: 所有家具（旧+新）的编号列表，每项含 rank（网格中存储的编号）、name、isGroup；同类填充家具共享同一 rank
outputs.description-en: Complete furniture index (old + new), each item with rank, name, isGroup; same-type fill furniture share the same rank.

outputs.name: diagnostics
outputs.label: 诊断日志
outputs.description: 填充过程的诊断信息，含每次放置结果、停止原因和占用率状态
outputs.description-en: Diagnostic log of the fill process, including each placement result, stop reason, and occupancy status.
